Interface ISARXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a SAR transform.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F523D2B0-0CB2-4973-8E7B-768562BD0131")]
public interface ISARXform : IGeodataXform
